0.name: ANDERSON, MICHAEL
0.summary: Resident became verbally aggressive towards nursing staff during medication administration. Used inappropriate language and threatened staff members.
0.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Medication refusal, change in routine
0.interventions: No Progress Note Found Within 24hrs of RIM - De-escalation techniques used, resident redirected to calming activity

1.name: JOHNSON, SARAH
1.summary: Resident found wandering in hallway during night shift. Attempted to enter other residents' rooms and exit facility.
1.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Sundowning symptoms, disorientation
1.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Gentle redirection, safety measures implemented

2.name: WILLIAMS, ROBERT
2.summary: Resident physically aggressive during meal time. Struck another resident and threw objects at staff.
2.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Noise sensitivity, crowded environment
2.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Code White called, resident separated, medical assessment completed

3.name: BROWN, MARY
3.summary: Resident expressing suicidal ideation and self-harm thoughts. Found with sharp objects in room.
3.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Depression, social isolation
3.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Immediate safety assessment, psychiatric consultation requested

4.name: DAVIS, JOHN
4.summary: Resident resistant to personal care during bathing. Pushed staff member and refused assistance.
4.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Privacy concerns, discomfort with care
4.interventions: No Progress Note Found Within 24hrs of RIM - Alternative care approach, family contacted

5.name: MILLER, LINDA
5.summary: Resident making inappropriate sexual comments and advances towards other residents during group activity.
5.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Social interaction, group setting
5.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Behavioral intervention plan updated, staff training provided

6.name: WILSON, CHARLES
6.summary: Resident experiencing visual and auditory hallucinations. Appeared distressed and frightened by perceived threats.
6.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Medication changes, environmental factors
6.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Physician assessment completed, medication review scheduled

7.name: MOORE, ELIZABETH
7.summary: Resident refusing to take prescribed medications. Hiding pills and expressing distrust of medical staff.
7.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Medication side effects, paranoia
7.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Pharmacy consultation requested, pill crusher and supervision increased

8.name: TAYLOR, JAMES
8.summary: Resident collecting items from other residents' rooms and common areas. Room safety inspection required due to clutter.
8.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Anxiety, need for control
8.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Environmental modifications made, regular room checks scheduled

9.name: ANDERSON, PATRICIA
9.summary: Resident attempting to leave facility through main entrance. Claimed to be going home to family.
9.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Gentle redirection, family contacted for reassurance

10.name: THOMAS, RICHARD
10.summary: Resident verbally aggressive during toileting assistance. Used threatening language and refused care.
10.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Privacy concerns, embarrassment
10.interventions: No Progress Note Found Within 24hrs of RIM - Alternative care approach, dignity maintained

11.name: JACKSON, SUSAN
11.summary: Resident refusing to participate in group activities and social interactions. Isolating in room for extended periods.
11.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Depression, social anxiety
11.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Mental health assessment requested, social worker involved

12.name: WHITE, KEVIN
12.summary: Resident refusing meals and fluids for past 2 days. Expressing concerns about food safety and contamination.
12.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Paranoia, medication side effects
12.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Nutritional assessment, physician consultation, alternative food options provided

13.name: HARRIS, LISA
13.summary: Resident exhibiting repetitive questioning and pacing behavior. Disrupting other residents' activities.
13.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Anxiety, environmental overstimulation
13.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Calming environment created, structured activities provided

14.name: MARTIN, DAVID
14.summary: Resident experiencing sleep disturbances and nighttime confusion. Calling out for assistance throughout the night.
14.triggers: Within 24hrs of RIM - Sundowning, medication changes
14.interventions: Within 24hrs of RIM - Sleep study recommended, lighting adjustments made to room
